scenario.title: Monotonic targeted materialization and automatic source-gap repair
preconditions: P06 provides a runtime-issued source epoch and coherent bootstrap high watermark.
The fake runtime can block command responses, omit replay rows, fail replay reads, and return an atomic fallback bootstrap.
Goosetower starts from an exact last contiguous source cursor.

expected_runtime: command response carries the affected authoritative message/deliveries while the ledger independently emits newer truth
expected_goosetower: newer ledger truth wins; stale targeted response is rejected; no whole-source bootstrap is requested
expected_worker_store: not_applicable: P09 owns browser merge algebra
expected_visible: terminal/session and command admission truth are no longer held stale by a post-command cursor reset

expected_runtime: replay supplies missing rows or fails and supplies one coherent bootstrap at high watermark
expected_goosetower: all later reduction freezes, replay fills contiguously, and atomic snapshot fallback is installed only when replay cannot repair
expected_worker_store: source stays stale until continuity is restored; P09 owns explicit stale-set removal
expected_visible: risky commands remain disabled during the gap and can re-enable only after repaired Tower truth

expected_runtime: records retain authoritative timestamp revisions and the source supplies the coherent restart watermark
expected_goosetower: stale records cannot overwrite newer records; revisions survive rebuild; cursor dedupe and ledger retention remain bounded
expected_worker_store: not_applicable: P09 owns browser revision enforcement
expected_visible: reconstruction exposes the same authoritative session/team status

required: runtime records and ledger events govern effects
bootstrap snapshot and high watermark are the fallback authority
freeze then replay then atomic fallback
observed only; P09 owns browser operation algebra
must not clear stale state before Tower continuity
observed only; no P07 UI redesign

golden_goose_acceptance_lessons: rebuilds install at one atomic high watermark

gooselake.reason: P07 consumes the P06 runtime record, replay, epoch, and bootstrap contracts without changing runtime HTTP behavior.

goosetower.reason: Gateway command refresh, SSE handoff, materializer revisions, dedupe, and automatic gap replay/fallback now have monotonic single-owner semantics.

gooseweb.reason: P08-P10 own detail protocol, Worker/store algebra, subscription lifecycle, and remaining visible defects.

auth_account_state.reason: No ticket, account, workspace, or authorization behavior changes.

protocol_generated_code.reason: No Protobuf schema or generated file changes.

api_narrative_docs.reason: No runtime HTTP route, OpenAPI behavior, or public API contract changes in P07.

assertions: reviewer observes honest source health at each required viewport
composer bottom remains inside the viewport
critical actions remain reachable while source health is stale or unavailable

empty.expectation: Runtime epoch is nonempty and high_watermark is zero.

loading.expectation: Bootstrap reports replaying until the coherent snapshot is installed.

stale_gap_replaying.expectation: A gap retains the last contiguous cursor and never panics.

rejection_conflict.reason: P06 adds a read-only bootstrap route.

permission_denied.expectation: The bootstrap route requires the existing runtime bearer token.

terminal_error.expectation: 404 old runtime and unavailable runtime remain offline with source_epoch unavailable.

default_fixture_leak_assertions: No fake data enters production bootstrap.
Default and production URLs contain no fixture query parameter.
fixtures.gating: P02 fake source only under test or p02-verification feature.

baseline_detected.description: Runtime message/delivery/event and injection succeed while Team Comms remains empty.

baseline_detected.first_divergent_layer: Gooseweb Worker/store to React connection-state projection
baseline_detected.description: Browser and source-health projections disagree after reconnect and fresh-context reconstruction.
After reload at 520x900, Team Comms is absent from exposed semantic controls, so the critical surface is unreachable.
Every fresh browser attempt requests GET /favicon.ico and receives HTTP 404; the failed request remains blocked until the static asset route is corrected.

baseline_detected.first_divergent_layer: Goosetower session-detail snapshot kind to Gooseweb decoder/store
baseline_detected.description: Reload reconstruction loses terminal session detail even after live delivery succeeds.

baseline_detected.first_divergent_layer: Gooseweb persisted cursor to restarted gateway
baseline_detected.description: The cursor has no gateway epoch, so a restarted Tower sequence below the persisted floor suppresses a new source epoch.
A higher gateway sequence with a same-epoch source jump from 4 to 6 is currently accepted instead of requesting repair.

schema_migration.reason: No persistent runtime or Tower schema changes.

backfill.reason: Tower remains rebuildable from runtime records and ledger replay.

compatibility.reason: P06 bootstrap/epoch/healthy-idle/reconnect contracts remain green; old runtimes remain explicitly unavailable.

rollback.reason: Rollback restores command refresh behavior but does not alter durable runtime truth.

performance.reason: Targeted merges are bounded per affected entity; gap replay is paged and fallback is one bounded bootstrap.

security.reason: Existing runtime bearer and gateway authorization boundaries are unchanged.

data_retention_gc.reason: Dedupe uses the contiguous cursor and existing bounded ledger; no new retained product data.

deployment.reason: No configuration or deployment topology changes.

provenance_reuse.reason: Golden Goose persist/repair ordering informed the design; no source was copied.

native_tauri_assumptions_removed.reason: Only ordering and repair invariants were referenced.
